support.title: Contact Support
support.subject: Subject
support.subject_placeholder: What can we help you with?
support.success_message: Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
support.footer: Have a question or feedback? Send us a message and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy_policy.intro_text: Welcome to GrowDay. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about our policy, or our practices with regards to your personal information, please contact us.
privacy_policy.info_collect_text: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when registering at the application, expressing an interest in obtaining information about us or our products and services, when participating in activities on the application or otherwise contacting us. We also collect device sensor data, including physical activity (steps) and location (GPS) information, to calculate and track your habit progress in real-time.
privacy_policy.info_use_text: We use personal information collected via our application for a variety of business purposes described below. We process your personal information for these purposes in reliance on our legitimate business interests, in order to enter into or perform a contract with you, with your consent, and/or for compliance with our legal obligations.
privacy_policy.info_share_text: We only share information with your consent, to comply with laws, to provide you with services, to protect your rights, or to fulfill business obligations. We may process or share data based on the following legal basis: Consent, Legitimate Interests, Performance of a Contract, or Legal Obligations.
privacy_policy.info_keep_title: 5. How Long Do We Keep Your Information?
privacy_policy.info_keep_text: We keep your information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this privacy policy unless otherwise required by law. No purpose in this policy will require us keeping your personal information for longer than the period of time in which users have an account with us.
privacy_policy.info_safe_title: 6. How Do We Keep Your Information Safe?
privacy_policy.info_safe_text: We have implemented appropriate technical and organizational security measures designed to protect the security of any personal information we process. However, please also remember that we cannot guarantee that the internet itself is 100% secure.
privacy_policy.privacy_rights_text: In some regions, you have rights that allow you greater access to and control over your personal information. You may review, change, or terminate your account at any time.
privacy_policy.contact_us_text: If you have questions or comments about this policy, you may email us at growday.support@gmail.com.
privacy_policy.agreement_text: By using GrowDay, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

terms_of_service.intro_text: By accessing GrowDay, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the application.
terms_of_service.accounts_text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.
terms_of_service.prohibited_text: You may not use the app for any illegal purpose, or to violate any laws in your jurisdiction. You agree not to copy, modify, or distribute any part of the application without our permission.
terms_of_service.property_text: All content, features, and functionality of GrowDay are the exclusive property of our company and are protected by international copyright and trademark laws.
terms_of_service.liability_text: GrowDay shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the application.
terms_of_service.termination_text: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to the service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever.
terms_of_service.changes_text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes by posting the new terms on the application.
terms_of_service.agreement_text: By continuing to use GrowDay, you agree to these terms and conditions.

help.title: Help Center
help.hero_subtitle: Browse FAQs, explore features, or contact our support team.
help.tip: 💡 Tip: Consistency is the key to building lasting habits. Try completing at least one habit every day to build your streak!

faq.q1: How do I create a new habit?
faq.a1: Tap the green '+' button at the bottom of the screen. You can create a custom habit or choose from popular suggested habits. Set your schedule, goal, and reminders.
faq.a2: XP (Experience Points) are earned when you complete habits and tasks. They reflect your progress and consistency. The more you complete, the more XP you earn!
faq.q3: Why was I redirected to the login screen?
faq.a3: Your session may have expired. This is a security measure to protect your account. Simply log in again — your data is safe and unchanged.
faq.q4: What happens when a task's deadline passes?
faq.a4: Tasks that pass their deadline are automatically marked as 'Expired' at midnight. They are hidden from your active task list but preserved for your history and statistics.
faq.q5: Can I change the app language?
faq.a5: Yes! Go to Profile → Languages and select your preferred language. The app supports multiple languages including Azerbaijani, English, Russian, and more.
faq.q6: How do I track habit progress?
faq.a6: Open any habit from your home screen. You will see today's performance, your weekly progress, current streak, and best streak. You can also add notes for each day.
faq.a7: Go to Profile → Contact Support and send us a message. You can also email us directly at growday.support@gmail.com. We respond within 24 hours.
faq.q8: What is the AI Mentor and how does it work?
faq.a8: The AI Mentor is a premium productivity coach. It analyzes your last 14 days of habit streaks, completion rates, and goals to provide personalized, data-driven daily advice and feedback.
faq.q9: Why is the AI Mentor locked or limited?
faq.a9: The AI Mentor unlocks at Level 3 (earned via XP points) to ensure you have active habits to analyze. Free users have a limit of 5 messages per day, while Premium users get unlimited messages.
faq.a10: The XP Store lets you spend your earned XP points on premium items like profile borders, custom habit icons, theme packs, XP boosters, and motivation quote packs.
faq.q11: How do I earn XP to spend in the Store?
faq.a11: You earn XP by completing habits, finishing tasks, maintaining streaks, and unlocking achievements. The more consistent you are, the more XP you earn!

features.habits_desc: Create daily, weekly, or custom habits. Track streaks, view weekly charts, and add notes for each session.
features.tasks_desc: Complete assigned tasks to earn XP. Tasks have deadlines and priority levels — finish them before they expire!
features.stats_desc: View daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly statistics to understand your consistency and progress over time.
features.achievements_desc: Unlock badges and achievements as you reach milestones. Check your profile for new rewards!
features.explore_desc: Discover AI-curated learning articles and suggested habits tailored to your goals and preferences.
features.reminders_desc: Set smart notifications for your habits so you never miss a session. Customize reminder times per habit.
features.store_desc: Spend your earned XP on premium borders, custom habit icons, theme packs, and motivation quotes.
features.ai_mentor_desc: Get personalized productivity coaching based on your real habit data, streaks, and goals.

store.profile_subtitle: Buy Streak Freeze, protect your chain
store.feedback_items: Have new ideas or suggestions for other exciting XP store items? Send us a message from the Support section! 🚀
store.insufficient_xp_desc_custom: You need at least {{cost}} XP to buy {{item}}. Complete your habits to earn more points! 🎯

streak_freeze.title: Streak Freeze
streak_freeze.desc: A magical shield that protects your habit streak even if you forget to complete it at the end of the day. The system automatically consumes 1 freeze per missed day.

premium_border.title: Premium Profile Border
premium_border.desc: Activates a gorgeous, glowing multi-color magical gradient ring around your profile picture. Show everyone your level status!

xp_booster.title: 2x XP Booster (24h)
xp_booster.desc: Grants double the experience points (XP) for all habits and tasks completed in the next 24 hours. Level up at lightning speed!

custom_habit_icon.title: Custom Habit Icon
custom_habit_icon.desc: Unlocks a special panel allowing you to select custom premium emojis and colorful icons when creating or editing habits.

profile_badge.title: VIP Profile Badge
profile_badge.desc: Displays a shiny VIP crown (👑) icon next to your username in your profile, giving your account an ultra-premium look.

theme_pack.title: Premium Theme Pack
theme_pack.desc: Adds stunning Sunset Glow, Ocean Wave, Cyber Neon, and Rose Gold premium color themes, completely redesigning the app's look.

motivation_pack.title: Motivation Quote Pack
motivation_pack.desc: Adds a customized collection of daily premium motivation quotes and goal suggestions to your dashboard or notifications.

store.booster_limit_desc: The maximum duration for 2x XP Booster is 72 hours. Please wait until your active booster time decreases before purchasing more!
store.theme_locked_desc: To activate this premium theme, you must purchase the 'Premium Theme Pack' from the XP Store!
